experiences.summary: Building advanced digital products and AI-assisted solutions for private clients.
highlights: Project management for custom digital delivery
Agentic LLM workflows and product strategy

experiences.summary: Led bioinformatics and data analytics work for Vaccines R&D, spanning pipeline development, database design, microbial genomics, and cross-study evidence generation.
highlights: Data and knowledge integration for hypothesis generation
Exploratory models for pre-clinical, clinical, and epidemiological datasets
Study design, readout selection, analysis strategy, and publication support

experiences.role: Consultant in Data Science, Biology, Education and IT
experiences.summary: Delivered consulting work across Europe for research, education, and innovation teams, combining programming, design, and scientific leadership.
highlights: Clients included EPFL, University of Warwick, Biomillenia, Arcadia, HUG, BRTA, University of Bergen, Insight Technology Solutions, and Oxford IR, among others
Work ranged from data science and software delivery to UX/UI design and technical education

experiences.summary: Simulated models of forest biomass dynamics across 26 member countries to predict EU policy impact on carbon sequestration.
highlights: Built Python packages to automatically harvest, harmonize, and compare international forest datasets
Delivered scenario-based wood product supply and demand projections through 2050 for policy support
Published open-source packages and peer-reviewed publications

experiences.summary: Studied microbial communities with DNA sequencing data in the Molecular Systematics and Environmental Genomics laboratory.
highlights: Automated statistical workflows and visualization generation

experiences.summary: CRO providing comprehensive eDNA-based solutions for environmental monitoring with full chain project management: from sampling, sequencing, analysis all the way to insight communication and scientific writing.
Designed and delivered a Python course titled “Practical Python Programming for Big Data and the Scientist” for 20 PhD students within the graduate education program.
highlights: Hired and coordinated two teaching assistants

experiences.company: Bioinformatics and Biostatistics Core Facility at EPFL
experiences.summary: Supported research projects and developed tools for processing and analyzing high-throughput genomic sequencing data.
highlights: Collaborated on the development of an online interactive genome browser

education.summary: Built bioinformatics pipelines that processed over a billion DNA sequencing reads to characterize microbial communities in aquatic ecosystems (boreal lakes, the Danube river, and soda lakes).
details: Authored 5 publications and released seqenv, an open-source tool linking sequences to environments via NCBI homology search and ontology-based text mining
Reconstructed genomes from metagenomic datasets revealing previously undetected pathways (photoferrotrophy, anaerobic methane oxidation) in freshwater systems

education.summary: Dual specialization in Bioinformatics and Computational Neuroscience, with a strong focus on systems biology and quantitative modeling.
details: Coursework included computational molecular biology, machine learning, dynamical systems theory for engineers, graphs & networks, etc.
Built and ran a large student-operated online wiki for teaching resource exchange

education.summary: STEM track with a broad analytical foundation and a specialization in Biotechnology and Bioengineering.
details: Coursework included mathematical analysis, physics, chemistry, linear algebra, and computer science, etc.
Class delegate, member of the faculty student association and the campus coaching program

certifications.name: Project Management Prof. (PMP)
certifications.summary: Globally recognized certification covering predictive, agile, and hybrid approaches to leading projects, teams, and business outcomes.
details: Covers stakeholder engagement, team leadership, risk and change management across the project lifecycle

certifications.name: Academic Teacher Training
certifications.summary: Formal training in higher education pedagogy, course design, and learning assessment, qualifying for graduate-level instruction.
details: Course design, teaching methods, and student assessment
Reflective teaching practice and peer review
